Sanju Samson: 5 Stunning Records From His T20 Career

Sanju Samson has built an impressive reputation in T20 cricket with his explosive batting and match-winning performances.

Over the years, the Indian wicketkeeper-batsman has delivered several memorable innings while setting remarkable records in the format.

These achievements highlight Samson’s ability to dominate bowlers and entertain fans across leagues and international matches.
